steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a single HTML file with a two-column layout for the code walkthrough slide, then verify it by rendering to PNG.

First, I'll write the HTML/CSS code for the slide:

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Code Walkthrough: Attention Mechanism</title>
